issues.sample: ON FEB 2, 2017 MY CAR (2016 BMW 228I) SPONTANEOUSLY COMBUSTED IN MY DRIVEWAY AFTER BEING PARKED FOR APPROXIMATELY 4-1/2 HOURS.  THE VEHICLE HAD LESS THAT 13,000 MILES ON THE ODOMETER, AND WAS LAST SERVICED (WHICH WAS THE 1ST SCHEDULED SERVICE) THREE MONTHS PRIOR AT THE BMW DEALER

narrative.headline: What 2016 Bmw 2 Series owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 18 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (61% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
